title: Harden scientific workflow
summary: Hardened the manuscript workflow after the M48 failure: added scientific claim gates, quarantined M48, added M49 as the source-first DW audit, and made M47 conditional on M49.

user_inputs.text: Update the manuscript workflow and local skills so future scientific and mathematical claims require KnowledgeVault/raw-source or derivation provenance before entering manuscript prose, in response to the M48 failure.

agent_actions.description: Updated the local manuscript skill, manuscript rules, planning surfaces, formal registry, draft quarantine note, M48 audit note, citation provenance, review log, decision log, and human-readable logs.

checks.description: python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with expected open-milestone warning before closure; skill quick_validate.py: passed; git diff --check: passed with line-ending warnings only
